start: ^Hi neighbor. Thanks for being a part of the V.I.L.E. neighborhood watch. The vampires have been on the prowl with a plethora of ruses.
^Make sure you document as much as you can with the RECORD button.
^Unfortunately for your own safety, we don't recommend you intervene, but record, record, record. And when you see a violation, make sure to make a report.
^If we can get enough violations on record and enough videos of how ridiculous some of their totally legal ruses are, maybe we can get people to realize we're living in a terrible dystopia.
^Remind yourself of the vampire code in the bottom left of your screen. Good luck.
alert: ^There's been another tip about something happening.
